ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Balances context and persona but lacks naturalness in tone, could be more assertive to align with the Watch Captain's firm demeanor.

baseline_no_context<TAB>2<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>Short note: Maintains consistency but fails on context relevance and naturalness, could be more engaging with the player’s urgency in mind while still upholding security.
